# PR Insight: vllm-project/vllm-ascend #719

**Title:** [Feature] Add quant description file for new quant model generated by modelslim

## Overview
This PR adds support for a new quantization model format from msmodelslim where quantization_config is removed from config.json and quant_model_description.json is used instead. The change modifies quant_config.py.

## Technical Significance
Improves quantization model compatibility as msmodelslim evolves. Separating quantization configuration into a dedicated file enables cleaner model configs and easier quantization scheme management.
